title: Looking for Category Manager at Zostel

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Zostel
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zostel family as a Category Manager in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!
